query.description: Search query — company name, person name, or topic (e.g. 'Acko insurance India', 'Dario Amodei Anthropic')

num_results.description: Number of results to fetch. Keep low (5-10) for efficiency. Default 5.

days_back.description: Only return results published in the last N days. Omit for no date filter.

summary_question.description: Question Exa answers per result using its content (e.g. 'What has this company announced recently?'). Defaults to a generic company/person summary.
